query:
-- Categorize all users by their origin
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN email LIKE '%@ga-import.local' THEN 'ga_import'
    WHEN email LIKE '%@example.com' THEN 'seed_example'
    WHEN name LIKE 'Guest-%' AND name REGEXP '^Guest-[0-9]{5,}$' THEN 'seed_guest'
    WHEN openId LIKE 'open_user_%' THEN 'seed_open_user'
    WHEN openId LIKE 'ga-%' THEN 'ga_import'
    ELSE 'real_oauth'
  END AS origin,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM users
GROUP BY origin
ORDER BY cnt DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.root --database EorxrxCPNFVtGo7gjBVrJr --execute 
-- Categorize all users by their origin
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN email LIKE '%@ga-import.local' THEN 'ga_import'
    WHEN email LIKE '%@example.com' THEN 'seed_example'
    WHEN name LIKE 'Guest-%' AND name REGEXP '^Guest-[0-9]{5,}$' THEN 'seed_guest'
    WHEN openId LIKE 'open_user_%' THEN 'seed_open_user'
    WHEN openId LIKE 'ga-%' THEN 'ga_import'
    ELSE 'real_oauth'
  END AS origin,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM users
GROUP BY origin
ORDER BY cnt DESC;
